chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1656 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 24.10.2016. Mr. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Imamuddin Dahri, SHO P.S Salaro on behalf of SSP Matiari. -.-.-. Petitioners are present. On the last date, Petitioner No.1 Mst. Nadia has stated that she being sui juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her freewill and that neither she was abducted nor enticed away by the petitioner No.2 or anyone else for contracting such marriage against her wish and will. Today, learned A.A.G has filed statement on behalf of police officials/respondents, wherein, inter alia it has been stated that neither they are providing any shelter to private respondents nor causing harassment to the petitioners. However, learned A.A.G states that whenever petitioners will approach the concerned SHO, he will provide the requisite protection to them. Consequently, instant petition is disposed of with the directions to the official respondents/police officials to provide requisite protection to the petitioners strictly in accordance with law against the private respondents and ensure that no harm is caused to them. JUDGE Ali Haider
